title: Albemarle Corporation Recognized in 2022 Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index
text: CHARLOTTE, N.C., Jan. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Albemarle Corporation (NYSE: ALB), a leader in the global specialty chemicals industry, announced today it is one of 418 companies across 11 sectors to be included in the 2022 Bloomberg Gender-Equality Index (GEI), a modified market capitalization-weighted index that aims to track the performance of public companies committed to transparency in gender-data reporting.

title: Albemarle Corporation to Release Fourth-Quarter 2021 Earnings Results on Wednesday, Feb. 16, 2022
